archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Academic Structural Clarity

typography.strategy: High legibility, friendly but structured. Tight tracking for headings (>32px), loose line-height for body. NO Inter or default sans for headings.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for major containers to give breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.admin_dashboard: The 'Control Room' Grid but softened. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. gap-6. Flat, dense, minimal borders.
spacing_and_layout.student_voting: Mobile-first, centered bento style layout. Wide tap targets, clear negative space.
spacing_and_layout.radius: 0.75rem (rounded-xl) for cards, 9999px (rounded-full) for primary CTA buttons.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat Solid. bg-white with 1px subtle border (border-border) and soft shadow-sm. Avoid heavy shadows.
surfaces_and_components.header: Solid Background with a hard bottom border for admin. Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70 border-b border-border) for the student app.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary CTA must use primary color with hover state: hover:bg-[#3B5B7A] hover:text-white. Flat, no extreme gradients.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: Shadcn default customized with rounded-lg, border-border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A729A]/20.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle scale up (-translate-y-[2px]) and shadow-md on interactive voting cards.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide up using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have high contrast and clear focus rings.

icons.style: Clean, consistent stroke width (1.5px), soft edges.

media.strategy: Authentic, diverse student representation. Abstract calming backgrounds for frictionless feeling.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist background with soft pastel colors, pale blue, warm beige, and sage green (ideal for auth/landing pages).
Clean minimalist illustration of an election ballot box with soft pastel colors (use for empty states or successful vote completion).
Diverse group of smiling students taking a selfie in classroom (for login/landing marketing section).
Modern university campus building architecture (for about/info sections).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the defined color palette via Tailwind CSS configuration.
Ensure all fonts are imported correctly in index.css. Use Outfit for Headings and Work Sans for Body.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the Admin Dashboard (dense, clear hierarchy, subtle borders).
For the Student Voting interface, emphasize minimalism. One clear action per screen. Use large, accessible tap targets.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='submit-vote-button').
Never use fully transparent backgrounds for headers or cards over images. Use the defined Glassmorphism or solid colors.
Override default shadcn component styles (like cards) to match the 'Flat Solid' look defined in surfaces_and_components.
Do NOT use teal green or teal blue (#1B93A4) for dashboards. Use the assigned primary color (Muted Academic Blue).
Ensure high contrast on all text, particularly over the generated pastel backgrounds.
DO NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the provided media URLs from this JSON.
